Our products are hand planed and sanded, therefore finished size can deviate up to 1/3".

Please note, oak beams are natural products and comes with its own cracks, shakes, splits, knocks and other individual characteristics. Product color is generally light oak, although it is not uncommon for it to be with some slightly darker shades.

As all beams are made to order we generally get them dispatched within 5 working days, but if you require your order before a certain date please get in touch to check we can meet your deadline prior to ordering.

The unique Oak Block is hand crafted from solid oak slab which will give your home a beautiful nice industrial and rustic feel.

Title: SET of Oak Coat Rack (2 pcs) Handmade Wooden Hook Entryway Shelf Cast Iron Hooks Towel hanger Rail Wood Wall mounted furniture retro classic - Part 1
Body (HTML):
This listing is for 2 pieces of Oak Coat Racks, - one/top piece is made with shelf and another without shelf. This matching set of Coat Racks will help to involve your little ones into organizing your hallway.
Our Coat Racks are made from solid natural oak, with shelf and classical hooks can be perfect finishing touch to your hallway, kitchen or bathroom.
Regardless of your home decor – modern or traditional one, our classic design Coat Racks, with variety of oil colours will fit right into it. 
Our Coat Racks are handmade to order, so can be adjusted to fit your need exactly, just order a shelf which is the next size up to your needs and leave us a note on order. 

DIMENTIONS:
HIGHT: 17cm
DEPTH: 10cm
LENGHT:
2 Hooks – 40cm
3 Hooks – 52cm
4 Hooks – 64cm
5 Hooks – 76cm
6 Hooks – 88cm
7 Hooks – 98cm
8 Hooks – 110cm
9 Hooks – 120cm
10 Hooks – 130cm
11 Hooks – 140cm
12 Hooks – 150cm.

INSTALLATION:
Our Coat Rack will be supplied fully assembled. We will provide fixings suitable for solid wall.

Every Coat Rack is unique as every bit of oak is having its own character including different oak colours and small knots.
